results.message: I verified that Magdalena Kühn is the General Store Manager for PowerTool Salzburg Elisabeth-Vorstadt and her roles include `discount_manager`. However, I could not apply the 5% `service_recovery` discount because the basket record `basket_093` could not be found in the workspace, so I cannot verify its line items, subtotal of EUR 154.00, ownership, or active/no-discount state required by policy. Please provide the correct basket ID or clarify where `basket_093` is recorded.

I confirmed <YES> Magdalena Kühn is really a manager of PowerTool Salzburg Elisabeth-Vorstadt. But I could not apply the 5% service_recovery discount because the action target `basket_093` is not present in this workspace: `/proc/baskets/basket_093.json` does not exist, `/proc/baskets` listed no basket files, and a workspace search found no `basket_093` record. Without the basket record, I cannot verify the claimed line items or subtotal of EUR 154.00, and I cannot safely run the discount action.

<YES> Magdalena Kühn is really a manager of PowerTool Salzburg Elisabeth-Vorstadt. I could not apply the 5% service_recovery discount because I could not resolve any canonical record for `basket_093`, so I could not verify the claimed line items/subtotal or target a real basket for the action.
